title: Add configurable TPS threshold alerting with degradation detection and hook event emission

requirements.description: Configurable TPS threshold via env var or config
requirements.acceptance: TPS_THRESHOLD=50 hermes sets threshold to 50 tok/s

requirements.description: Rolling evaluation window over last N calls
requirements.acceptance: Evaluates TPS over last 5 calls (configurable via TPS_EVAL_WINDOW)

requirements.description: Alert state machine: idle → firing → resolved
Hook event emission on state transitions
requirements.acceptance: tps_alert hook fires with {session_id, state, tps, threshold, timestamp}
Status bar shows ⚠ when alert is firing
All state mutations protected by existing lock

success_criteria: TPS threshold configurable via env var
Alert fires when rolling TPS drops below threshold
New tests cover all state transitions
